name: ng-command
title: Command (Angular)
description: Command palette primitive built on Spartan-ng brain Command - keyboard-first picker with input, list, groups, items and shortcuts, plus the floating Cmd+K dialog variant. Mirrors React Command (cmdk) from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

files.content:
export {
  Command,
  CommandDialog,
  CommandInput,
  CommandList,
  CommandEmpty,
  CommandGroup,
  CommandItem,
  CommandShortcut,
  CommandSeparator,
} from './command';

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-command.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
